rows.label: qev050103_MSG0001
rows.name: So you are my master's messenger...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0002
rows.name:
I have a question. Are you a soldier
capable of taking a serious strike
without breaking, and standing back up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050103_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him what he means by that.

rows.label: qev050103_JNK0020
rows.name: Promise

rows.label: qev050103_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell him not to worry and to
come at you with full force.

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0003
rows.name:
You are the first Earthling I have faced.
If I were to accidentally kill you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0004
rows.name:
No... I suppose such concerns
are unnecessary for one chosen
by my master, Go Belg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Heh... It seems my worries were
unfounded. I apologize for my rudeness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0006
rows.name:
That unwavering gaze of yours... I
understand why my master chose you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Forgive the lengthy introduction...
I am... Gi Ziorde...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0008
rows.name:
My master seems to view Gi Ziordo
and myself as equals in skill.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0009
rows.name:
But I am nothing like that brute
who relies solely on raw strength...
I am a true warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0010
rows.name:
Calmly reading the battlefield and cutting
through with swift techniques... Now is
the time to prove my way is correct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0011
rows.name: Let us duel... fair and square![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0012
rows.name: I heard Gi Ziordo lost to you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0013
rows.name:
This is exactly why I warned him. I told him
that a brutish man like him would eventually
leave an opening and be struck down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0014
rows.name:
So, tell me. Did Gi Ziordo put up a
fight worthy of the Larsian name?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_JNK0030
rows.name: Strong

rows.label: qev050103_SEL0031
rows.name:
Say you were overwhelmed by the pressure
of his massive frame and sword.

rows.label: qev050103_JNK0040
rows.name: Weak

rows.label: qev050103_SEL0041
rows.name:
Put on a confident face and say
it wasn't much of a challenge.

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0015
rows.name:
To be toyed with by a man who relies
only on brute strength... Perhaps our
master made a mistake in judging you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0017
rows.name:
As expected... He merely swings his
absurd strength around without
understanding how to properly utilize it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0018
rows.name:
Forgive the lengthy introduction...
I am... Gi Ziorde...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0019
rows.name:
My master seems to view Gi Ziordo
and myself as equals in skill.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0020
rows.name:
But I am nothing like that brute
who relies solely on raw strength...
I am a true warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0021
rows.name:
Calmly reading the battlefield and cutting
through with swift techniques... Now is
the time to prove my way is correct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050103_MSG0022
rows.name: Let us duel... fair and square![ST:wait ]
